mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID , U.EMAIL , U.NICKNAME , U.CREATED_AT , P.MEMBERSHIP_TYPE , P.BIRTH_DATE , P.BIO , P.PHOTO_URL , P.UPDATED_AT FROM USER_TBL U LEFT JOIN PROFILE_TBL P ON U.USER_ID = P.USER_ID WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT ORDER_ID AS orderId , ITEM_NAME AS itemName , TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount , APPROVED_AT AS approvedAt , CREATED_AT AS createdAt , STATUS AS status , PAYMENT_TYPE AS paymentType FROM PAYMENT_ORDER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(APPROVED_AT, 'YYYY-MM') AS yearMonth , SUM(TOTAL_AMOUNT) AS totalAmount FROM PAYMENT_ORDER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND APPROVED_AT >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12) GROUP BY TO_CHAR(APPROVED_AT, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY yearMonth ASC

SELECT NVL(COUNT(CASE WHEN SCORE = 1 THEN 1 END), 0) AS totalPlayCount
, NVL(COUNT(CASE WHEN SCORE = 5 THEN 1 END) * 10, 0) AS totalPlayTimeSec
, NVL(COUNT(CASE WHEN SCORE = 5 AND CREATED_AT >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -1) AND CREATED_AT < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') THEN 1 END) * 10, 0) AS prevMonthPlayTimeSec
, NVL(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN SCORE = 1 THEN SONG_ID END), 0) AS uniqueTrackCount
FROM SONG_SCORE_TBL WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'D')) AS dayIndex , COUNT(*) AS playCount FROM SONG_SCORE_TBL WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND SCORE = 5 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'D') ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'D')) ASC

SELECT * FROM (
SELECT G.NAME AS genreName , COUNT(*) AS playCount , ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 0) AS percentage FROM (
SELECT SONG_ID FROM SONG_SCORE_TBL WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND SCORE = 5 GROUP BY SONG_ID HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ) VALID_SONGS JOIN SONGS_TBL S ON VALID_SONGS.SONG_ID = S.SONG_ID JOIN SONG_GENRE_TBL SG ON S.SONG_ID = SG.SONG_ID JOIN GENRES_TBL G ON SG.GENRE_ID = G.GENRE_ID GROUP BY G.NAME ORDER BY playCount DESC )
WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT S.SONG_ID AS songId , S.TITLE AS title , A.NAME AS artistName , COUNT(*) AS playCount FROM SONG_SCORE_TBL SS JOIN SONGS_TBL S ON SS.SONG_ID = S.SONG_ID JOIN ARTISTS_TBL A ON S.ARTIST_ID = A.ARTIST_ID WHERE SS.USER_ID = #{userId} AND SS.SCORE = 1
AND SS.CREATED_AT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')
AND SS.CREATED_AT >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -1) AND SS.CREATED_AT < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')
AND SS.CREATED_AT >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -3)
GROUP BY S.SONG_ID, S.TITLE, A.NAME ORDER BY playCount DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ARTIST_ID AS artistId , A.NAME AS name , (
SELECT AL.COVER_IMAGE_URL FROM ALBUMS_TBL AL WHERE AL.ARTIST_ID = A.ARTIST_ID AND AL.RELEASE_DATE = ( SELECT MAX(AL2.RELEASE_DATE) FROM ALBUMS_TBL AL2 WHERE AL2.ARTIST_ID = A.ARTIST_ID ) AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS coverImageUrl , COUNT(DISTINCT SS.SONG_ID) AS playCount FROM SONG_SCORE_TBL SS JOIN SONGS_TBL S ON SS.SONG_ID = S.SONG_ID JOIN ARTISTS_TBL A ON S.ARTIST_ID = A.ARTIST_ID WHERE SS.USER_ID = #{userId} AND SS.SCORE = 1 GROUP BY A.ARTIST_ID, A.NAME ORDER BY playCount DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
